description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with 'Community_Newsletter.docx', a 2-column newsletter article that currently looks messy because of ragged text edges. Perform professional typesetting by applying Justify alignment to all body text and enabling automatic hyphenation with a 0.25-inch hyphenation zone and a limit of 2 consecutive hyphens. Additionally, insert a 3-line 'Dropped' Drop Cap for the first paragraph of the article. Save the changes to the document.
